conflits.legende: Each chain traces a multi-node path connecting Édouard Philippe to a private interest. The links show the intermediaries and transmission mechanisms. The consequences are documented and sourced.

reseau.title: Network — Cartography of the 4 centroïdes
reseau.description: Interactive cartography of cross-linked networks Juppé–Philippe–Raffarin–Villepin. 4 centroïdes, political, Chinese, financial and media connections.
reseau.heading: Network
reseau.subtitle: {count} mapped connections — the Juppé–Philippe–Raffarin–Villepin diamond
reseau.analyseText: These four figures do not share the same objectives — Villepin and Philippe are direct competitors for 2027. What they share are structural conditions that produce convergent behaviours: the same institutional mould (Sciences Po → ENA → Conseil d'État / Quai d'Orsay), the same Chiraquian matrix, the same pantouflage logic, the same elite selection programmes (FAF, FCF).

juppé.description: Neutralised godfather at the CC. The « Juppist » faction forms the backbone of Horizons. Residual power: institutional, symbolic, reticular.

philippe.description: Operational heir. Institutional Chinese network (FCF, FAF). Declared 2027 candidate. Mayor of Le Havre, president of Horizons.

villepin.description: Multipolar and opaque private network (China, Qatar, Russia). Direct competitor to Philippe.

raffarin.description: Sino-French switchboard. Member of Horizons AND official representative for China. Alerted by DGSI. Medal of Xi Jinping's Friendship.
